basic_details.job_title: RRB Ministerial and Isolated Category Exam Date 2026 Out - Check Schedule
basic_details.short_information: This section gives a quick snapshot of the exam notice for candidates who want the key facts at a glance before going through the detailed schedule.

important_dates.raw: This section covers when and where candidates can access their exam city details and download their e-call letters. | The link to check Exam City & Date and to download the Travel Authority for SC/ST candidates will go live 10 days before the exam date, on the official websites of all RRBs and on rrb.indianrailways.gov.in. E-Call Letters will be available for download starting 4 days before the exam date mentioned in the Exam City and Date intimation link.

important_instructions: This section explains the Aadhaar-related requirements candidates must complete before appearing for the CBT.
RRB has laid out mandatory Aadhaar-linked biometric verification steps for entry into the exam hall:

Aadhaar-linked biometric authentication will be conducted at the exam center before candidates are allowed into the exam hall. Candidates must carry their original Aadhaar card or a printout of their e-verified Aadhaar. Candidates who haven't completed Aadhaar authentication should do so by logging in at rrbapply.gov.in. Aadhaar must be kept in an unlocked condition in the UIDAI system before arriving at the exam center to avoid registration delays. Aadhaar details (name, date of birth as per Class 10 certificate, photograph, address, and father's name) should be accurate and updated.

all_official_links.label: RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category Exam Date 2026

content_sections.heading: RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category Exam Date 2026 - CBT Scheduled for 14 & 15 July
content_sections.text: The Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB) have announced the tentative exam date for the Ministerial & Isolated Category recruitment under CEN 08/2025. As per the official notice dated 29 June 2026, the Computer Based Test (CBT) will be conducted on 14 and 15 July 2026. Candidates who applied for this recruitment can check the complete exam schedule, e-call letter timeline, and Aadhaar verification guidelines below. Click Here: RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category Exam Date 2026

content_sections.heading: RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: This section gives a quick snapshot of the exam notice for candidates who want the key facts at a glance before going through the detailed schedule.

content_sections.heading: RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category Exam Date 2026
content_sections.text: This section explains the confirmed CBT dates announced by RRB for the Isolated Categories recruitment. RRB has officially confirmed that the Computer Based Test for CEN 08/2025 (Isolated Categories) will be held on 14 and 15 July 2026. This is currently a tentative schedule, and candidates are advised to keep checking the official RRB websites for any further updates or changes.

content_sections.heading: Exam City, Date Intimation & E-Call Letter Schedule
content_sections.text: This section covers when and where candidates can access their exam city details and download their e-call letters. The link to check Exam City & Date and to download the Travel Authority for SC/ST candidates will go live 10 days before the exam date, on the official websites of all RRBs and on rrb.indianrailways.gov.in. E-Call Letters will be available for download starting 4 days before the exam date mentioned in the Exam City and Date intimation link.

content_sections.heading: Aadhaar Verification Guidelines for Exam Day
content_sections.text: This section explains the Aadhaar-related requirements candidates must complete before appearing for the CBT. RRB has laid out mandatory Aadhaar-linked biometric verification steps for entry into the exam hall: Aadhaar-linked biometric authentication will be conducted at the exam center before candidates are allowed into the exam hall. Candidates must carry their original Aadhaar card or a printout of their e-verified Aadhaar. Candidates who haven't completed Aadhaar authentication should do so by logging in at rrbapply.gov.in . Aadhaar must be kept in an unlocked condition in the UIDAI system before arriving at the exam center to avoid registration delays. Aadhaar details (name, date of birth as per Class 10 certificate, photograph, address, and father's name) should be accurate and updated.

content_sections.heading: Important Advisory for Candidates
content_sections.text: This section highlights RRB's official caution to candidates regarding fake job offers and unauthorized sources. RRB has reiterated that candidates should rely only on official RRB websites for recruitment updates and avoid unauthenticated sources. The board has also warned against touts who mislead candidates with false promises of job appointments through illegal means selection is strictly based on CBT performance and merit.

content_sections.heading: About RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category Recruitment (Background)
content_sections.text: Note: The details below were released earlier as part of the application process and are provided here for background context only they are not part of today's exam date notice. The Ministerial & Isolated Category recruitment (CEN 08/2025) covers a total of 312 posts, with online applications having been accepted from 30 December 2025 to 29 January 2026. The recruitment includes posts such as Junior Translator (Hindi), Staff and Welfare Inspector, Chief Law Assistant, Lab Assistant Grade III, Senior Publicity Inspector, Publicity Prosecutor, and Scientific Assistant (Training), each with distinct educational qualification requirements. Selection involves a Written Examination, Skill/Typing Test, Document Verification, and Medical Examination

faq.question: Q1. When is the RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category exam in 2026?
faq.answer: The Computer Based Test (CBT) for RRB Ministerial & Isolated Category (CEN 08/2025) is tentatively scheduled for 14 and 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Is the RRB CEN 08/2025 exam date final?
faq.answer: No, RRB has described this as a tentative schedule. Candidates should regularly check official RRB websites for confirmation or updates.

faq.question: Q3. When will the RRB Exam City and Date link be activated?
faq.answer: The Exam City & Date link will be made live 10 days before the exam date on official RRB websites.

faq.question: Q4. When can candidates download their RRB e-call letter for CEN 08/2025?
faq.answer: E-call letters can be downloaded starting 4 days before the exam date.

faq.question: Q5. What documents should candidates carry for Aadhaar verification?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their original Aadhaar card or a printout of their e-verified Aadhaar.
